heroHeadline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely; IRGC Seizes Vessels; Lebanon Seeks Extension at State Dept
heroSubtitle: Trump indefinitely extended the US–Iran ceasefire Apr 21 contingent on Iran's unified proposal — but IRGC seized two vessels in the Strait of Hormuz on Apr 22 and the US issued a 3-5 day ultimatum. Lebanon's 10-day ceasefire (begun Apr 16) is up for one-month extension in Washington talks with Secretary Rubio. DRC–M23 COVM verification missions ongoing. Myanmar junta's 100-day peace offer rejected by NUG. Ukraine–Russia talks remain stalled. 11 ceasefires nominally in force globally.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN, African Union, IGAD, Crisis Group, USIP, PA-X Database, and Tier 1–3 sources across all media poles.
